properties.description: Data collection rule for Wiz connector - Issues, Vulnerabilities, and Audit Logs

dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend TimeGenerated = now(), IssueId = tostring(id), CreatedAt = todatetime(createdAt), UpdatedAt = todatetime(updatedAt), DueAt = todatetime(dueAt), ResolvedAt = todatetime(resolvedAt), StatusChangedAt = todatetime(statusChangedAt), IssueType = tostring(type), Status = tostring(status), Severity = tostring(severity), SourceRule = sourceRule, Projects = projects, EntitySnapshot = entitySnapshot, ServiceTickets = serviceTickets, Notes = notes, SourceURL = tostring(sourceURL) | project TimeGenerated, IssueId, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt, DueAt, ResolvedAt, StatusChangedAt, IssueType, Status, Severity, SourceRule, Projects, EntitySnapshot, ServiceTickets, Notes, SourceURL

source | extend TimeGenerated = now(), VulnerabilityId = tostring(id), PortalUrl = tostring(portalUrl), Name = tostring(name), CVEDescription = tostring(CVEDescription), CVSSSeverity = tostring(CVSSSeverity), Score = todouble(score), ExploitabilityScore = todouble(exploitabilityScore), ImpactScore = todouble(impactScore), HasExploit = tobool(hasExploit), HasCisaKevExploit = tobool(hasCisaKevExploit), Status = tostring(status), VendorSeverity = tostring(vendorSeverity), FirstDetectedAt = todatetime(firstDetectedAt), LastDetectedAt = todatetime(lastDetectedAt), ResolvedAt = todatetime(resolvedAt), Description = tostring(description), Remediation = tostring(remediation), DetailedName = tostring(detailedName), Version = tostring(version), FixedVersion = tostring(fixedVersion), DetectionMethod = tostring(detectionMethod), Link = tostring(link), LocationPath = tostring(locationPath), ResolutionReason = tostring(resolutionReason), ValidatedInRuntime = tobool(validatedInRuntime), EpssSeverity = tostring(epssSeverity), EpssPercentile = todouble(epssPercentile), EpssProbability = todouble(epssProbability), LayerMetadata = layerMetadata, Projects = projects, VulnerableAsset = vulnerableAsset | project TimeGenerated, VulnerabilityId, PortalUrl, Name, CVEDescription, CVSSSeverity, Score, ExploitabilityScore, ImpactScore, HasExploit, HasCisaKevExploit, Status, VendorSeverity, FirstDetectedAt, LastDetectedAt, ResolvedAt, Description, Remediation, DetailedName, Version, FixedVersion, DetectionMethod, Link, LocationPath, ResolutionReason, ValidatedInRuntime, EpssSeverity, EpssPercentile, EpssProbability, LayerMetadata, Projects, VulnerableAsset

source | extend TimeGenerated = now(), AuditLogId = tostring(id), Action = tostring(action), RequestId = tostring(requestId), Status = tostring(status), Timestamp = todatetime(timestamp), UserAgent = tostring(userAgent), SourceIP = tostring(sourceIP), ServiceAccount = serviceAccount, User = user | project TimeGenerated, AuditLogId, Action, RequestId, Status, Timestamp, UserAgent, SourceIP, ServiceAccount, User
